source.business_scenario: customer 主查询 + 相关 rental 子查询
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name,
       (SELECT MAX(rental_date) FROM rental r WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS last_rental
FROM customer c
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20
